{{Infobox group
| name = Akura prime team
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Akura prime team]] includes [[Akura Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Akura]] team is being chased.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13">''Uncrowned'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Eithan]] called the [[Akura]] team to them.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Akura]] team is present in the [[arena]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16">''Uncrowned'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
